samples.xml_description: Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication. Multiplicand input. Multiplier input. Product output. Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication. Shift count register. Shift count register. Multiplication completion flag. Multiplicand register. Multiplier register. Product register. if (!rst_n) begin i <= 0; end else if (i < 17) begin i <= i + 1; end else if (!start) begin i <= 0; end if (!rst_n) begin done_r <= 0; end else if (i == 16) begin done_r <= 1; end else if (i == 17) begin done_r <= 0; end if (!rst_n) begin areg <= 0; breg <= 0; yout_r <= 0; end else if (start) begin if (i == 0) begin areg <= ain; breg <= bin; end else if (i > 0 && i < 17) begin if (areg[i-1]) begin yout_r <= {yout_r, breg << (i-1)}; // Shift and accumulate end end end yout = yout_r;
